summary: Project involves a proxy page with configurable proxy providers. User is updating the proxy provider from allorigins.win to https://proxycroxy.io.
architectural_notes: Proxy provider set to https://proxycroxy.io (replaced allorigins.win)

existing_features.title: In the tab navigation hook (useTabs.ts), replace all occurrences of the allorigins.win CORS proxy URL with https://proxycroxy.io as the proxy provider in the fallback chain and any URL construction logic.
In TabContent.tsx and HomeSearch.tsx, replace any hardcoded allorigins.win proxy references with https://proxycroxy.io to ensure the iframe proxy loading uses the updated provider.
In ProxyInfoPanel.tsx, update any displayed CORS proxy route descriptions or labels that reference allorigins.win to instead show https://proxycroxy.io.
